nasb.text: So Amnon lay down and pretended to be ill; when the king came to see him, Amnon said to the king, “Please let my sister Tamar come and make me a couple of cakes in my sight, that I may eat from her hand.”

esv.text: So Amnon lay down and pretended to be ill. And when the king came to see him, Amnon said to the king, “Please let my sister Tamar come and make a couple of cakes in my sight, that I may eat from her hand.”

cnv.text: 於是暗嫩躺著裝病。王來看他，暗嫩對王說：“求你叫我的妹妹他瑪來，叫她在我眼前給我做兩個餅，我可以從她的手裡拿過來吃。”

ccb.text: 暗嫩就躺在床上装病。王来看他的时候，他便对王说：“请你叫我妹妹她玛来这里，在我面前做两个饼，请她亲自递给我吃。”
